title: Nox-driven aggregate CI workflows in superrepo

source.subject: ci: Nox-driven aggregate workflows; bump compiler and pckg

body:
Introduces **Nox-driven aggregate CI workflows** on the superrepo and bumps compiler/pckg submodule SHAs.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`60e84d3`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/60e84d3)
- **Subject:** ci: Nox-driven aggregate workflows; bump compiler and pckg
- **Completed:** 2026-04-13

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`

## Relation
Centralizes cross-repo CI entry points for v0.1.
